creator: andy.lavr@gmail.com
text:
/bin/sh ./libtool --tag=CXX --mode=link c++ -Wall -Wwrite-strings -Woverloaded-virtual  -Wno-sign-compare  -fno-builtin-malloc -fno-builtin-free -fno-builtin-realloc  -fno-builtin-calloc -fno-builtin-cfree  -fno-builtin-memalign -fno-builtin-posix_memalign  -fno-builtin-valloc -fno-builtin-pvalloc      -O2 -pipe -O2 -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2 -pipe -march=native -mtune=native -fno-delete-null-pointer-checks -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing -Wformat -Wformat-security -fno-omit-frame-pointer -s -fconserve-space -no-undefined   -o atomicops_unittest  atomicops_unittest.o   libspinlock.la libsysinfo.la liblogging.la 
libtool: link: c++ -Wall -Wwrite-strings -Woverloaded-virtual -Wno-sign-compare -fno-builtin-malloc -fno-builtin-free -fno-builtin-realloc -fno-builtin-calloc -fno-builtin-cfree -fno-builtin-memalign -fno-builtin-posix_memalign -fno-builtin-valloc -fno-builtin-pvalloc -O2 -pipe -O2 -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2 -pipe -march=native -mtune=native -fno-delete-null-pointer-checks -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing -Wformat -Wformat-security -fno-omit-frame-pointer -s -fconserve-space -o atomicops_unittest atomicops_unittest.o  ./.libs/libspinlock.a ./.libs/libsysinfo.a ./.libs/liblogging.a
if c++ -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I. -I. -I./src  -I./src   -Wall -Wwrite-strings -Woverloaded-virtual  -Wno-sign-compare  -fno-builtin-malloc -fno-builtin-free -fno-builtin-realloc  -fno-builtin-calloc -fno-builtin-cfree  -fno-builtin-memalign -fno-builtin-posix_memalign  -fno-builtin-valloc -fno-builtin-pvalloc     -O2 -pipe -O2 -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2 -pipe -march=native -mtune=native -fno-delete-null-pointer-checks -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing -Wformat -Wformat-security -fno-omit-frame-pointer -s -fconserve-space -MT stacktrace_unittest.o -MD -MP -MF ".deps/stacktrace_unittest.Tpo" -c -o stacktrace_unittest.o `test -f 'src/tests/stacktrace_unittest.cc' || echo './'`src/tests/stacktrace_unittest.cc;  then mv -f ".deps/stacktrace_unittest.Tpo" ".deps/stacktrace_unittest.Po"; else rm -f ".deps/stacktrace_unittest.Tpo"; exit 1; fi
/bin/sh ./libtool --tag=CXX --mode=link c++ -Wall -Wwrite-strings -Woverloaded-virtual  -Wno-sign-compare  -fno-builtin-malloc -fno-builtin-free -fno-builtin-realloc  -fno-builtin-calloc -fno-builtin-cfree  -fno-builtin-memalign -fno-builtin-posix_memalign  -fno-builtin-valloc -fno-builtin-pvalloc      -O2 -pipe -O2 -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2 -pipe -march=native -mtune=native -fno-delete-null-pointer-checks -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing -Wformat -Wformat-security -fno-omit-frame-pointer -s -fconserve-space -no-undefined   -o stacktrace_unittest  stacktrace_unittest.o       libstacktrace.la liblogging.la 
libtool: link: c++ -Wall -Wwrite-strings -Woverloaded-virtual -Wno-sign-compare -fno-builtin-malloc -fno-builtin-free -fno-builtin-realloc -fno-builtin-calloc -fno-builtin-cfree -fno-builtin-memalign -fno-builtin-posix_memalign -fno-builtin-valloc -fno-builtin-pvalloc -O2 -pipe -O2 -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2 -pipe -march=native -mtune=native -fno-delete-null-pointer-checks -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing -Wformat -Wformat-security -fno-omit-frame-pointer -s -fconserve-space -o stacktrace_unittest stacktrace_unittest.o  ./.libs/libstacktrace.a ./.libs/liblogging.a
